name: Agentic-Mixed-Precision-Demo build and drivers
description: Environment setup, Kokkos bootstrap, and incremental builds. Driver binaries and CLI details live in targets.json (catalog). Replace ${PROJECT_ROOT} with the absolute repository root (or set AGENTIC_MIXED_PRECISION_DEMO_ROOT).

PROJECT_ROOT.resolve: If the env var is set, use it; otherwise use the directory containing workflow.json.

catalog.purpose: Lists driver ids, executables, source paths, and shared CLI/baseline conventions.

prerequisites: Run all shell steps from bash (or zsh) so `source` works.
After prepare.sh and Kokkos install, Kokkos CMake config must be on CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH (build_with_Kokkos.sh writes setup.sh under the Kokkos clone; sourcing it is part of that script).

steps.purpose: Load site modules and compilers (ALCF-style); adjust scripts/prepare.sh for other machines.
First-time: clone/build/install Kokkos under ${PROJECT_ROOT}, then configure and build this project into ${PROJECT_ROOT}/build.
steps.when: Kokkos has not been built for this tree yet

steps.purpose: Incremental rebuild of the demo after editing sources (e.g. kokkosUtils.h). Reconfigures and builds only this project under ${PROJECT_ROOT}/build; does not rebuild Kokkos. Requires Kokkos already installed and CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH set (from prior build_with_Kokkos.sh or equivalent).
steps.when: Every rebuild after the first Kokkos bootstrap, including mixed-precision experiments

run_driver.documentation: Pick a driver from targets.json drivers[].id; executable is ${PROJECT_ROOT}/<executable_relative>; use default_cli for positional args unless the driver entry adds overrides later.

experiment.description: Incremental build (optional), run a driver from targets.json (--driver ID, default ddilog), compare to baseline. Default output under experiments/<id>/generated/.

ddilog_experiment.description: Wrapper: run_experiment.sh --driver ddilog. Same as experiment for the ddilog driver only.
